description: Template variables are substituted with real values when user selects a template
steps: Open the email client modal on a case with known client and user data
Select a template from the dropdown that contains {clientFirstName}, {userName}, and {userTitle}
Implement substitution logic that replaces known variables with values from case/user context
Verify the subject and message fields show the substituted values instead of {variable} placeholders

description: Send button is blocked when unresolved placeholders remain in subject or message
steps: Open the email client modal and select a template containing a manual-replacement variable like {date}
Implement validation that scans subject and message for unresolved [bracket] and {variable} placeholders
Click Send without replacing the placeholder
Verify an inline error appears listing the unresolved placeholders
Replace the placeholder with real text and verify Send is now enabled

description: Confirmation dialog appears when selecting a template while content already exists
steps: Open the email client modal and type text into the subject and message fields
Select a template from the dropdown
Implement a confirmation dialog that warns the user their existing content will be replaced
Click Cancel and verify the original content is preserved
Click Continue and verify the template content replaces the existing content

description: Pronoun variables resolve correctly based on client gender
steps: Open the email client modal on a case where the client has a known gender
Select a template containing {pronoun} and {pronounPossessive}
Implement pronoun resolution: Male maps to he/his, Female to she/her, Other to they/their
Verify pronouns are substituted correctly for each gender value
For a client with no gender set, verify fallback to bracket placeholders like [He/She]

description: Unknown variables fall back to bracket placeholders and block send
steps: Open the email client modal and select a template containing an unrecognized variable like {customVar}
Implement fallback logic that converts unknown {variables} to [Human Readable] bracket format
Verify the unrecognized variable appears as a bracket placeholder in the message
Attempt to send and verify the validation error lists the unresolved placeholder
Manually replace the placeholder and verify sending is unblocked
